title: The Krieg Pirates Bring War to the Baratie
description: On pages 12–14, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji... Please forgive me! I had no idea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No idea at all that this would happen...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's no need for you to apologize.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SIR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The cooks of this restaurant acted out of their own free will, and this is the result of that.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sir! How could you of all people side with Sanji on this!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just what's the meaning of this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! He's the one to blame for all this!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He just wants to destroy this restaurant that's so important to you, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Were you planning on using this mess we're in to become the next head chef!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Or have you just completely lost it!? Which is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Silence, you numb-skulls!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have any one of you ever been hungry enough to die...??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do any of you know just how terrifying and painful it is,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: to be stuck in this ocean, deprived of food and water!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What do you mean, sir!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If you've got time to be crying over split milk,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then just leave this place using the back door!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm... I'm gonna stay here.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I wouldn't be able to live with myself if I just left without a fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...same here. This is the place I live and work at.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not like I've got anywhere else to go to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-What're you all doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haven't you realized how powerful the Don is by now!? You need to run away!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Hey, gin...

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
